title: saintmorysia
side_effects: Saintmorysia can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches. In severe cases, overconsumption of the plant's extracts can lead to liver damage and respiratory issues. Additionally, individuals with pre-existing conditions, such as high blood pressure, may experience worsened symptoms or even heart palpitations. Furthermore, improper use of saintmorysia may also interact with certain medications, resulting in adverse reactions.
